title: Table Generation
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a table with 5 columns and 10 rows, where each row contains a unique set of values. The prompt should be able to handle different table sizes and generate a table that is neatly formatted and easy to read.
constraints: Must use a neat and consistent formatting style

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated table is syntactically valid and correctly formatted
Each row contains a unique set of values
The generated table is easy to read and understand
